entries.note: V58-A reuses the shipped V57 observation, restoration, and hardening surfaces by default.
V58-A adds one explicit current-turn admission record before live-turn reintegration may be declared.
Outer writes_allowed and approval posture remain necessary at most and do not mint inner V56 ticket authority.
V58-A requires one explicit handoff from the shipped V56-B ticket lineage into the selected V57-A observed create_new effect path.
Positive reintegration in V58-A requires declared current-turn witness basis rather than transcript or prior-artifact replay alone.
Observability echoes remain non-independent support and must preserve root-origin dedup discipline.
